---
title: "Schedule"
back-to-top-navigation: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

:::: schedule-page
[THURSDAY, JULY 15, 2027]{.schedule-date}

### Join us to celebrate this special day with family and friends.

[5:30 pm]{.schedule-time}

[Lightfoot & Wolfville Vineyards]{.schedule-venue}

[11143 Nova Scotia Trunk 1, Wolfville, NS B4P 2R2, Canada](https://maps.google.com/?q=Lightfoot+%26+Wolfville+Vineyards+Wolfville+NS){.schedule-address}

Wear what makes you feel comfortable.

After the ceremony there will be a cocktail hour with light bites, followed by dinner among the vines. At the end of the night the celebration continues with dancing and drinks.

::: schedule-buttons
[Map](https://maps.google.com/?q=Lightfoot+%26+Wolfville+Vineyards+Wolfville+NS){.btn-dark target="_blank"} [Add to Calendar](https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render?action=TEMPLATE&text=Nicoletta+%26+Burc%27s+Wedding&dates=20270715T173000/20270716T010000&details=Join+us+to+celebrate+at+Lightfoot+%26+Wolfville+Vineyards&location=Lightfoot+%26+Wolfville+Vineyards%2C+Wolfville%2C+NS){.btn-dark target="_blank"}
:::
::::

![Source: https://winesofnovascotia.ca](images/Lightfoot-Wolfville-fi-DJI_0038.jpg){fig-align="center"}
